run.window_note: Strict 72h window (June 8–11) yielded 6 verified items, above the ≤5 expansion threshold. No window expansion applied.

items.title: Google releases DiffusionGemma 26B open model

key_claims.claim: 1,000+ tokens/sec on H100; 700+ tokens/sec on RTX 5090
key_claims.source: Google Developers Blog (T2); vendor-measured, unverified independently

key_claims.claim: Up to 4× faster than autoregressive Gemma (vendor-claimed)
key_claims.source: Google Developers Blog (T2); parallel block diffusion vs sequential — different architecture, not quality comparison

caveats: Speed figures are vendor-measured; no independent replication at publication
Output quality lower than standard Gemma 4 per Google's own documentation — explicit design trade-off
4× speed comparison is architecture-specific; not a direct task-quality benchmark

items.title: Claude Fable 5 available on Databricks via Unity AI Gateway

key_claims.claim: Available across AWS, Azure, GCP rolling out week of June 9
AI Spend Controls: per-user, per-team, per-workspace, per-account
All requests/responses logged to Unity Catalog
30-day data retention for trust and safety (Anthropic policy)

caveats: Multi-cloud rollout described as 'over the next week'; Azure/GCP may not be fully live at publication
OfficeQA Pro benchmark cited by Databricks is vendor-provided, not independently verified

items.title: OpenAI models and Codex accessible through Oracle Cloud commitments
items.tier_note: openai.com returned HTTP 403 during this run. Primary URL confirmed via secondary sources.

key_claims.claim: Oracle customers apply OCI Universal Credits toward OpenAI models and Codex

caveats: Credit redemption pricing structure not disclosed in available secondary sources

items.title: xAI begins deploying Grok V9-Medium to Tesla fleet and X platform
items.tier_note: Primary xAI source (x.ai/blog) inaccessible (HTTP 403). Deployment traces to Musk's X posts (T2 for direct statement); confirmed by secondary press.

key_claims.source: Secondary sources citing Musk's May 26 X post

key_claims.claim: V9-Medium trained with Cursor developer-workflow data
0.5T variant planned for open-source by end of 2026

caveats: No independent benchmark results for V9-Medium at publication
Deployment to Tesla/X is internal rollout; developer API access not yet confirmed
xAI blog inaccessible (HTTP 403); claims from secondary reporting
Mid-June API date is stated intent, not confirmed schedule

items.title: Anthropic pledges $200M for AI economic research; CEO publishes five-pillar policy framework
items.tier_note: Essay is T2 (CEO's own primary statement). $200M fund confirmed only via AP wire (T3); no Anthropic.com news post identified.

key_claims.claim: Policy proposals: wage insurance, retention credits, UBI via corporate taxes or capital gains

caveats: Fund announcement confirmed only via AP wire; no Anthropic.com primary post found
Essay and fund are companion pieces but separate provenance
Policy proposals are advocacy positions, not legislative commitments

items.title: OpenAI submits confidential S-1 to SEC
items.tier_note: openai.com returned HTTP 403. Primary URL confirmed via Fortune and NBC News.

key_claims.claim: Analyst-estimated IPO window: Sept–Nov 2026 (not company guidance)

caveats: IPO timing unconfirmed; filing opens the option but commits to nothing
Analyst IPO window is estimate, not OpenAI forward guidance
